data.title: Former SafeMoon CEO Braden Karony Convicted of Securities Fraud, Wire Fraud, and Money Laundering
data.description:
On May 21, 2025, a federal jury in Brooklyn convicted Braden John Karony, the former CEO of SafeMoon LLC, on all counts of a three-count indictment: conspiracy to commit securities fraud, wire fraud, and money laundering. The charges stemmed from Karony's role in defrauding investors in the SafeMoon
source: https://theholycoins.com/news/former-safemoon-ceo-braden-karony-convicted-of-securities-fraud-wire-fraud-and-money-laundering

data.title: Giant Retailer To Lose $403,000,000 After ‘Highly Sophisticated and Targeted’ Cyberattack Exposes Sensitive Customer Data

data.title: Semler Scientific makes fresh $50M BTC purchase near all-time high price
data.description:
On May 23, 2025, Semler Scientific, Inc. filed a Form 8-K with the SEC, in which it outlined its latest Bitcoin investments and at-the-market (ATM) equity offering progress. According to the filing, Semler Scientific has established a Bitcoin dashboard on its website to meet Regulation FD requirements, ensuring broad access to material information. The dashboard […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/semler-scientific-makes-50m-btc-purchase/

data.title: Pi Network token makes derivatives debut on Kraken with perpetual futures offering 20x leverage
data.description:
Kraken has introduced perpetual futures contracts for Pi Network’s native token, PI, allowing traders to speculate on its price with up to 20x leverage, according to a May 23 announcement. The listing marks the token’s first appearance on a major derivatives platform. However, it failed to create positive momentum for the token’s price
source: https://cryptoslate.com/pi-network-token-makes-derivatives-debut-on-kraken-with-perpetual-futures-offering-20x-leverage/

data.title: Exclusive: Armando Pantoja alleges JPMorgan manipulated Bitcoin market entry
data.description:

source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/policy/exclusive-armando-pantoja-alleges-jpmorgan-manipulated-bitcoin-market-entry

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: No HODLing For Congress, 48% Say Elected Members Shouldn't Be Able To Buy Cryptocurrency
data.description:
So far, cryptocurrency is not outlined in the proposed P. E. L. O. S. I. Act, a bill that would ban members of Congress from buying and selling stocks, options and ETFs. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/25/05/45594252/exclusive-no-hodling-for-congress-48-say-elected-members-shouldnt-be-able-to-buy?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Bitcoin whale James Wynn pushes 40x long position to $1.07 billion
data.description:
James Wynn, a pseudonymous crypto trader known for swinging massive positions on-chain, has expanded his Bitcoin long bet to $1. 07 billion using 40x leverage on Hyperliquid, the decentralized derivatives platform. The final scale-up was shared by James via X on Friday, with a screenshot that showed the total exposure was pegged at 974. 44634 BTC, entered […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-whale-james-wynn-long-position-1-07b/
